name: Ityuwa eqhelekileyo (0.9% NaCl)
description: Isotonic crystalloid fluid. Isetyenziselwa i-IV fluid resuscitation. Kumothuko owophayo, sebenzisa ngononophelo -- imiqulu emikhulu iba worse icoagulopathy (hyperchloremic acidosis, dilutional coagulopathy). I-hypotension evumayo ekhethwayo ekungeneni kwintlungu elindele ukulawulwa kokuphuma kwegazi.
dose: Umothuko we-Hemorrhagic: Umlinganiselo ukuya kwi-1L ubukhulu obulindelekileyo ekulawuleni ukopha (permissive hypotension). Ithagethi ye-SBP 80-90 mmHg kwi-trauma yokungena, i-90 mmHg kwi-TBI. I-non-hemorrhagic hypovolemia: 500 mL boluses, uphinde uhlolisise.
warnings: Umthamo omkhulu ubangela i-hyperchloremic metabolic acidosis kunye ne-dilutional coagulopathy -- yenza mandundu isithathu esibulalayo kumonzakalo.
I-Lactated Ringer's (LR) ikhethwa kwivolomu enkulu yokuvuselela ukwenzakala.
UNGAVUMELI ngokugqithisileyo umonzakalo wokungena emzimbeni phambi kotyando lolawulo lokopha (i-permissive hypotension).

pediatric.dose: I-20 mL / kg IV bolus, phinda uhlolisise. Phinda ubuninzi x3 (60 mL/kg iyonke) phambi kokuqwalasela iimveliso zegazi.

obstetric.note: Ukuvuselelwa okusemgangathweni kwi-obstetric hemorrhage. Ukuvuselela ulwelo olunamandla olulungele ukopha kwasemva kokubeleka ngaphambi kokuba kufumaneke iimveliso zegazi.

source: JTS CPG: Damage Control Resuscitation / PHTLS
